mapper.select: SELECT s.*, c.class_name FROM info_student s LEFT JOIN sys_class c ON s.class_id = c.id WHERE s.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY s.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO info_student(user_id, class_id, student_no, name, gender, create_time, del_flag) VALUES(#{userId}, #{classId}, #{studentNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE info_student SET del_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
